TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: owas na bnkisan Tayal lalu' san ta owas na bnkisan Tayal bih llyung Klesan ga "owas na Tayal". kahun innglung ta tbcyan tna'an mita owas na bnkisan Tayal kwe ga, maki tugan cnyan ta lalu nya: utux ga owas na pnluhing bnkis lela, sa'ing ga baley na owas Tayal son ta, tugan ga owas p'wasan na Mrhow Tayal son ta kmayan, ini ga owas na bnkis Tayal uy, ini ga owas na bnkisan Tayal. cka na owas pn'wasan kya ga, nya pnluhing snrhuw na bnkisan ta lela, "owas na lmuhuw", kwe ga baley "owas na snbilan bnkisan", iyik yow na owas snbilan bnkisan ta kwe ga, maki ci yow nya, yani ci nya sbiru suruw: te qutux ga owas na lmuhuw, owas na lmuhuw kwe ga magan ini ptna' gaga p'wasan, tbcyan ga kyan (1) owas na klahang gaga na sna'san na ryax (2) owas na mbahing, nanak knerin naha mowas, ini powas mlikuy ro nanak mwah twang shelow ke hiya (3) owas p'wasan sna'san ryax na hntgan la'iy, mnagan lpyung, ms'un mrkyas, m'out mlahuy. (4) owas na skramat (5) owas na smiyey. te saying gaowas na knbahan, ini ga son ta kmayal maha owas na knhmgan te tugal ga owas na ppiyiy ta te payat ga owas na lmuhuw nya pkita snrhow ke ro yow na puying khulan ta. te magal ga owas na la'iy, owas na la'iy ga nya tbcyan owas na la'iy hbku, owas trang maki inlungan na la'iy, maki owas na la'iy tipik, maki owas na la'iy ci, maki owas na p'wasan la'iy hopa, maki owas la'iy p'wasan na yaya ro la'iy.
S.PHON: owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕan tajal laluʔ s~ɕan ta owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕan tajal βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan ɣa "owas~ɕ na tajal". kaħun inŋluŋ ta tβʦ~ʨjan tnaʔan mita owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕan tajal kwe ɣa, maki tuɣan ʦ~ʨnjan ta lalu nja: utux ɣa owas~ɕ na pnluħiŋ βnkis~ɕ lela, s~ɕaʔiŋ ɣa βalej na owas~ɕ tajal s~ɕon ta, tuɣan ɣa owas~ɕ pʔwas~ɕan na mrħow tajal s~ɕon ta kmajan, ini ɣa owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕ tajal uj, ini ɣa owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕan tajal. ʦ~ʨka na owas~ɕ pnʔwas~ɕan kja ɣa, nja pnluħiŋ s~ɕnrħuw na βnkis~ɕan ta lela, "owas~ɕ na lmuħuw", kwe ɣa βalej "owas~ɕ na s~ɕnβilan βnkis~ɕan", ijik jow na owas~ɕ s~ɕnβilan βnkis~ɕan ta kwe ɣa, maki ʦ~ʨi jow nja, jani ʦ~ʨi nja s~ɕβiru s~ɕuruw: te qutux ɣa owas~ɕ na lmuħuw, owas~ɕ na lmuħuw kwe ɣa maɣan ini ptnaʔ ɣaɣa pʔwas~ɕan, tβʦ~ʨjan ɣa kjan (*) owas~ɕ na klaħaŋ ɣaɣa na s~ɕnaʔs~ɕan na rjax (*) owas~ɕ na mβaħiŋ, nanak knerin naħa mowas~ɕ, ini powas~ɕ mlikuj ro nanak mwaħ twaŋ s~ɕħelow ke ħija (*) owas~ɕ pʔwas~ɕan s~ɕnaʔs~ɕan rjax na ħntɣan laʔij, mnaɣan lpjuŋ, ms~ɕʔun mrkjas~ɕ, mʔout mlaħuj. (*) owas~ɕ na s~ɕkramat (*) owas~ɕ na s~ɕmijej. te s~ɕajiŋ ɣaowas~ɕ na knβaħan, ini ɣa s~ɕon ta kmajal maħa owas~ɕ na knħmɣan te tuɣal ɣa owas~ɕ na ppijij ta te pajat ɣa owas~ɕ na lmuħuw nja pkita s~ɕnrħow ke ro jow na pujiŋ kħulan ta. te maɣal ɣa owas~ɕ na laʔij, owas~ɕ na laʔij ɣa nja tβʦ~ʨjan owas~ɕ na laʔij ħβku, owas~ɕ traŋ maki inluŋan na laʔij, maki owas~ɕ na laʔij tipik, maki owas~ɕ na laʔij ʦ~ʨi, maki owas~ɕ na pʔwas~ɕan laʔij ħopa, maki owas~ɕ laʔij pʔwas~ɕan na jaja ro laʔij.
S.FORM: owas na bnkisan Tayal lalu' san ta owas na bnkisan Tayal bih llyung Klesan ga "owas na Tayal". kahun innglung ta tbcyan tna'an mita owas na bnkisan Tayal kwe ga, maki tugan cnyan ta lalu nya: utux ga owas na pnluhing bnkis lela, sa'ing ga baley na owas Tayal son ta, tugan ga owas p'wasan na Mrhow Tayal son ta kmayan, ini ga owas na bnkis Tayal uy, ini ga owas na bnkisan Tayal. cka na owas pn'wasan kya ga, nya pnluhing snrhuw na bnkisan ta lela, "owas na lmuhuw", kwe ga baley "owas na snbilan bnkisan", iyik yow na owas snbilan bnkisan ta kwe ga, maki ci yow nya, yani ci nya sbiru suruw: te qutux ga owas na lmuhuw, owas na lmuhuw kwe ga magan ini ptna' gaga p'wasan, tbcyan ga kyan (1) owas na klahang gaga na sna'san na ryax (2) owas na mbahing, nanak knerin naha mowas, ini powas mlikuy ro nanak mwah twang shelow ke hiya (3) owas p'wasan sna'san ryax na hntgan la'iy, mnagan lpyung, ms'un mrkyas, m'out mlahuy. (4) owas na skramat (5) owas na smiyey. te saying gaowas na knbahan, ini ga son ta kmayal maha owas na knhmgan te tugal ga owas na ppiyiy ta te payat ga owas na lmuhuw nya pkita snrhow ke ro yow na puying khulan ta. te magal ga owas na la'iy, owas na la'iy ga nya tbcyan owas na la'iy hbku, owas trang maki inlungan na la'iy, maki owas na la'iy tipik, maki owas na la'iy ci, maki owas na p'wasan la'iy hopa, maki owas la'iy p'wasan na yaya ro la'iy.
S.PHON: owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕan tajal laluʔ s~ɕan ta owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕan tajal βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan ɣa "owas~ɕ na tajal". kaħun inŋluŋ ta tβʦ~ʨjan tnaʔan mita owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕan tajal kwe ɣa, maki tuɣan ʦ~ʨnjan ta lalu nja: utux ɣa owas~ɕ na pnluħiŋ βnkis~ɕ lela, s~ɕaʔiŋ ɣa βalej na owas~ɕ tajal s~ɕon ta, tuɣan ɣa owas~ɕ pʔwas~ɕan na mrħow tajal s~ɕon ta kmajan, ini ɣa owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕ tajal uj, ini ɣa owas~ɕ na βnkis~ɕan tajal. ʦ~ʨka na owas~ɕ pnʔwas~ɕan kja ɣa, nja pnluħiŋ s~ɕnrħuw na βnkis~ɕan ta lela, "owas~ɕ na lmuħuw", kwe ɣa βalej "owas~ɕ na s~ɕnβilan βnkis~ɕan", ijik jow na owas~ɕ s~ɕnβilan βnkis~ɕan ta kwe ɣa, maki ʦ~ʨi jow nja, jani ʦ~ʨi nja s~ɕβiru s~ɕuruw: te qutux ɣa owas~ɕ na lmuħuw, owas~ɕ na lmuħuw kwe ɣa maɣan ini ptnaʔ ɣaɣa pʔwas~ɕan, tβʦ~ʨjan ɣa kjan (*) owas~ɕ na klaħaŋ ɣaɣa na s~ɕnaʔs~ɕan na rjax (*) owas~ɕ na mβaħiŋ, nanak knerin naħa mowas~ɕ, ini powas~ɕ mlikuj ro nanak mwaħ twaŋ s~ɕħelow ke ħija (*) owas~ɕ pʔwas~ɕan s~ɕnaʔs~ɕan rjax na ħntɣan laʔij, mnaɣan lpjuŋ, ms~ɕʔun mrkjas~ɕ, mʔout mlaħuj. (*) owas~ɕ na s~ɕkramat (*) owas~ɕ na s~ɕmijej. te s~ɕajiŋ ɣaowas~ɕ na knβaħan, ini ɣa s~ɕon ta kmajal maħa owas~ɕ na knħmɣan te tuɣal ɣa owas~ɕ na ppijij ta te pajat ɣa owas~ɕ na lmuħuw nja pkita s~ɕnrħow ke ro jow na pujiŋ kħulan ta. te maɣal ɣa owas~ɕ na laʔij, owas~ɕ na laʔij ɣa nja tβʦ~ʨjan owas~ɕ na laʔij ħβku, owas~ɕ traŋ maki inluŋan na laʔij, maki owas~ɕ na laʔij tipik, maki owas~ɕ na laʔij ʦ~ʨi, maki owas~ɕ na pʔwas~ɕan laʔij ħopa, maki owas~ɕ laʔij pʔwas~ɕan na jaja ro laʔij.
